creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since I currently lack the time to work on this, here's the last response
for the record:

Thomas Goirand, 28.06.10, 18:31h CEST:

> Hi Stefan,
> 
> Thanks for "unbreaking" our FreeBSD port, but there is a much much much
> better version of DTC's port that is available on our FTP:
> 
> http://ftparchive.gplhost.com/pub/dtc/bsd/dtcBSDport-0.31.0.1.tar.gz
> 
> Do you think it would be possible that you upload this version to
> replace the actual port? A huge FreeBSD work has been made by a
> contributor in Argentina. I'm sure he would appreciate a lot that his
> work was shared with everyone.
